# Trading Tazos Game — llms.txt

> A browser-based collectible battling game with 349 tazos across 3 franchises.
> Built with Next.js 16, Three.js, Tailwind CSS.

## Quick Links
- Home: https://tradingtazosgame.com
- How to Play: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=how-to-play
- Shop: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=shop (bag preview)
- Collections: https://tradingtazosgame.com/collections/minimon | dracobell | cybermon
- Tazo Catalog: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=tazos
- Leaderboard: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=leaderboard
- FAQ: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=faq
- Battle: https://tradingtazosgame.com/app/battle (login required)
- Battle Tubes (Decks): https://tradingtazosgame.com/app/decks (login required)
- Healthcheck: https://tradingtazosgame.com/api/health
- GitHub: https://github.com/smouj/Trading-Tazos-Game

## Project
- **Name**: Trading Tazos Game (TTG)
- **Stack**: Next.js 16 App Router, Three.js/R3F, Tailwind CSS 4, Prisma + SQLite, PM2
- **Description**: Digital tazo (pog) collection and battle game. 30 published tazos (349 planned) across Minimon, Dracobell, and Cybermon franchises. Features include: bag-opening shop with rarity breakdowns, Battle Tubes (physical tube builder 2.5D), 3D vertical slam battle arena (Three.js), quest system (17 quests), leaderboard, scanner, and a magazine-style UI with CSS finish shaders (18 finishes: holo, prismatic, aurora, etc.).
- **Release**: v0.5.0 — all P0 bugs fixed, production stable on VPS

## Key Pages
- `/` — Magazine-style launcher landing with hero, tazo showcase, how-to-play, collections, shop, leaderboard, FAQ
- `/collections/{franchise}` — Standalone SEO landing per franchise (minimon, dracobell, cybermon)
- `/?page=tazos` — Filterable public tazo catalog (search by name, franchise, rarity)
- `/?page=shop` — Public bag shop preview with rarity breakdowns and example tazos
- `/?page=how-to-play` — Vertical Slam battle tutorial (Aim → Charge → Tilt → Slam)
- `/?page=download` — Desktop app downloads (Linux, Windows, macOS)
- `/app` — Authenticated magazine-shell game hub
- `/app/collection` — User collection with finish shaders and Active Deck badge
- `/app/decks` — Battle Tubes shelf (2.5D CSS physical tubes with stacked discs)
- `/app/battle` — 3D Vertical Slam battle arena (Three.js/R3F)
- `/app/shop` — Bag opening (Classic/Premium/Mega) with animated reveals
- `/app/quests` — Quest system (17 daily/weekly/beginner quests)
- `/app/stats` — Player statistics dashboard
- `/app/scanner` — Tazo scanner (upload → detect → crop via sharp)
- `/login` / `/register` — Auth pages with email + OAuth (GitHub, Google, Discord)
- `/privacy` `/terms` `/cookies` `/disclaimer` — Legal pages

## API (public)
- `GET /api/tazos?publishStatus=published` — Public tazo catalog (30 tazos)
- `GET /api/leaderboard?sort=credits|tazos|battles` — Rankings with real DB data
- `GET /api/quests` — Quest definitions (17 quests)
- `GET /api/stats` — Global stats (tazo count, franchise distribution)
- `GET /api/health` — Healthcheck (DB status, uptime, counts)
